summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nurekha multi-tenant AI chat automation SaaS. All backend APIs and frontend auth flows working perfectly. Tested admin login, dashboard functionality, agent management, and all auth pages.
passed_tests: Dashboard stats API returns quota and agent count
User registration with Nepal mobile validation
Login page renders with all required elements
Login flow redirects to dashboard successfully
Dashboard overview shows all stat cards
Agents page loads and shows empty state
Create agent dialog opens and creates agents
Signup page renders with all 10 form fields
Forgot password page renders with email input
